text: Ladder Cable Trays Manufacturer Ladder type of cable trays are used for distributing heavy duty cables Manufacturer in Coimbatore, This may be economical to perforated cable trays with desirable features. The loading capacity is more , the strength of the cable trays can be tuned as per requirements. As perforated trays ladder trays also are fabricated from M.S sheets with different finishing and PreGalvanized sheets for direct & immediate installation. The best advantage of ladder type cable trays are that moisture can’t accumulate on them.
